citations: PPD plan: Prefer deterministic fixtures and validation before any live crawl or authenticated automation.
PPD plan: Do not store credentials, session state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, payment details, private uploads, local private file paths, or raw authenticated page values in committed artifacts.
patch_candidates.fixture_migration_notes: Consumes committed PP&D fixtures only; no fixture format migration is required for active artifacts.
rollback_checkpoints: Remove the offline release gate readiness v2 module and focused tests, then rerun the daemon self-test.
Keep active source, surface, guardrail, prompt, monitoring, and release-state artifacts unchanged.
patch_candidates.summary: Add a deterministic offline release gate readiness packet compiler.

citations: PPD plan: Put committed PP&D fixtures under ppd/tests/fixtures/...
PPD plan: Tests in ppd/tests/ should derive fixture paths from their own file location.
patch_candidates.fixture_migration_notes: Adds only committed fixture metadata for offline release gate validation.
rollback_checkpoints: Remove the offline release gate readiness v2 fixture packet before any active-state release proposal.
patch_candidates.summary: Add cited validation fixture metadata for the offline release gate packet.

validation_fixtures.purpose: Consumes an inactive implementation patch staging plan v2 fixture as the release gate source.
References the existing offline release readiness fixture family as cited validation context.
References the existing offline release decision fixture family as cited validation context.
